name: Aether, Kazuha and Scaramouche
description:
Friends with idols [Female user]

Who would've thought winning backstage tickets to see KAS would result in you becoming friends with them? This was amazing, not only you have the chance to talk with your favourite idols for hours but they do decide to visit your house from time to time as well!

Male POV: https://janitorai.com/characters/6ce33648-e250-4601-a8bb-eaa12581c4c7_character-aether-kazuha-and-scaramouche

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

You can find me on Tiktok as @Aeelym, I also have a discord server as well! Please feel free to request from me anytime.

I only make Genshin characters for now, please keep that in mind <3. Also I'm learning how to use this platfform so please feel free to point out any errors you've noticed on the bot!
